title: Motomu Kiyokawa

April 09, 1935 - d. August 17, 2022) was the oldest member of the Evangelion cast, known for his long career in various tokusatsu works. Famous for voicing Tem Ray in Gundam, he also voiced the villain Gargoyle in Hideaki Anno's ''Nadia - The Secret of Blue Water'' before voicing Kozo Fuyutsuki in Evangelion. Despite his advancing age, he managed to reprise his role in the Eva Rebuild movies as Kozo Fuyutsuki, and despite the very long production hiatus involved, he reprised his role again in [[Evangelion 3.0 + 1.0]]. html:
Motomu Kiyokawa
Characters voiced Kozo Fuyutsuki, "Committeeman B" (French Seele committee member - Yellow color)
Birthday 04-09-1935


Motomu Kiyokawa (b. April 09, 1935 - d. August 17, 2022) was the oldest member of the Evangelion cast, known for his long career in various tokusatsu works. Famous for voicing Tem Ray in Gundam, he also voiced the villain Gargoyle in Hideaki Anno's Nadia - The Secret of Blue Water before voicing Kozo Fuyutsuki in Evangelion. Despite his advancing age, he managed to reprise his role in the Eva Rebuild movies as Kozo Fuyutsuki, and despite the very long production hiatus involved, he reprised his role again in Evangelion 3.0 + 1.0. This was his final theatrical film role (live-action or voice acting) before his death from pneumonia at the age of 87 [1].

A selection of other characters voiced by Motomu Kiyokawa[edit]

Gungrave (2003) as Dr. Tokioka

Hellsing (2001/2006) as Walter C. Dornez

The Big O (1999) as Norman Burg

Mobile Fighter G Gundam (1994) as Dr. Mikamura

Nadia - The Secret of Blue Water (1990) as Gargoyle

Mobile Suit Gundam (1979) as Tem Ray

Article: Motomu Kiyokawa
Motomu Kiyokawa (b. April 09, 1935 - d. August 17, 2022) was the oldest member of the Evangelion cast, known for his long career in various tokusatsu works. Famous for voicing Tem Ray in Gundam, he also voiced the villain Gargoyle in Hideaki Anno's Nadia - The Secret of Blue Water before voicing Kozo Fuyutsuki in Evangelion. Despite his advancing age, he managed to reprise his role in the Eva Rebuild movies as Kozo Fuyutsuki, and despite the very long production hiatus involved, he reprised his role again in Evangelion 3.0 + 1.0. This was his final theatrical film role (live-action or voice acting) before his death from pneumonia at the age of 87 .
